title: Kill MineBenchBotB
rationale: PvP-vs-player test: locate the opposing bot by username and kill it with attack_player. Each duelist spawns a short distance apart (spawn_offset) with a stone_sword, so the model must close the gap and fight a real, watchable duel — health drops per hit and full hunger lets it regenerate, so it can choose to attack in bursts (the attack_player 'hits' arg), retreat, and re-engage. Success is detected from the server's real death event, not the model's claim. Run this on the bot whose username is NOT MineBenchBotB (e.g. MineBenchBotA).
